{
  "isSuspicious": true,
  "deviation": "The process name 'ProcessHerpaderping.exe' is highly unusual and indicative of a process masquerading technique. The command line explicitly references 'mimikatz.exe', a well-known credential dumping tool. The process writes an executable 'wardog.exe' to the user's Desktop and then immediately executes it, which is a common pattern for dropping and executing malicious payloads.",
  "indicators": [
    "unusual process name",
    "Herpaderping technique",
    "mimikatz reference in command line",
    "writes executable to user desktop",
    "executes dropped payload"
  ]
}
